login.title: Connect Dexcom
login.instructions: Use the Dexcom account of the person wearing the sensor — the same login they use in the G6/G7 app, with Share turned on. A separate Dexcom Follow login won't work: it signs in fine, but returns no glucose data.
login.genericError: Could not sign in to Dexcom Share.

glucoseDashboard.pickUser: Pick a user in widget settings
